name: DAUPNet: Domain-Aware Uncertainty Modeling for Reliable Prototype Discrimination in Cross-Domain Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation

description: arXiv:2607.16308v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Cross-domain few-shot semantic segmentation (CD-FSS) has predominantly been formulated as learning domain-invariant representations or improving support-query correspondence. Nevertheless, large domain shifts still make prototype matching unreliable: inconsistent hierarchical responses corrupt the support representation, deterministic prototypes...
author: Lei Yuan, Zhongxu Hu, Jingyi Wen, Pengxing Yi
